name: self-referential relationship (entity_ref == object_entity_ref) persists without crash
description: Adversarial self-edge probe. A relationship fact has entity_ref == object_entity_ref (Me.knows -> Me) and a second on a non-Me entity (Cleo.rival -> Cleo). Both refs resolve to the SAME entity. The pipeline must handle the degenerate loop: _resolve_entities dedupes the name, _upsert_fact resolves both subject and object to the same id, decide treats it as a non-functional relationship and inserts. Pins that a self-loop is stored (active, subject==object) rather than crashing or being silently dropped — the property graph permits reflexive edges. (Me resolves to the canonical confirmed owner entity.)

steps.body: Honestly, I am my own worst critic. And Cleo is her own biggest rival.

facts.statement: I am my own worst critic.
Cleo is her own biggest rival.
